zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Bertram於1128年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德米特福德時，他的父親William Bertram 2nd Baron of Mitford, the fair49歲，母親Hawise Balliol26歲。他和Ada de Morville至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1177年9月29日在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德布林可本享年49歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德布林可本。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger Bertram于1128年出生在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德米特福德时，他的父亲William Bertram 2nd Baron of Mitford, the fair49岁，母亲Hawise Balliol26岁。他和Ada de Morville至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1177年9月29日在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德布林可本享年49岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德布林可本。

nameMeanings.name: Bertram
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German, English (mainly in southeastern Scotland, of Norman origin), French, and Danish: from the ancient Germanic personal name Bertram, composed of the elements berht ‘bright, famous’ + hramn ‘raven’. The raven was the bird of Odin, king of the gods, in ancient Germanic mythology. The personal name was common in France throughout the Middle Ages (especially in the form Bertrand ), where its popularity was increased by the fame of the troubadour Bertrand de Born (c. 1140–1214). The name was taken to England by the Normans in the forms Bertran(d), Bertram, and Bartram.

variants.name: Beltrami
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Dante, Dino, Marco, Pio, Sal, Tullio.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of the personal name Beltrame, from an ancient Germanic name composed of the elements berht ‘bright, famous’ + hramn ‘raven’. See also Bertram .

variants.name: Bartram
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and North German: variant of   Bertram  .

History: William Bartram, a Quaker, had a large farm near Darby, PA, when his eldest son, John, the first American botanist, was born in 1699. John conducted botanical experiments at his own farm in Kingsessing, PA, near Philadelphia.

variants.name: Bertman
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Frieda, Wilhelm.
Americanized form of German Bertmann: altered form (by folk etymology) of Bertram .

variants.name: Bethke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Eldor, Ewald, Otto, Rudi, Wilhelmina.
North German: from a pet form of the ancient Germanic personal names   Bertram   or   Berthold  . See also   Beth  .

variants.name: Bertrand
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Andre, Armand, Monique, Francois, Gilles, Raoul, Emile, Herve, Jacques, Jean-Marie, Odette.

French, Walloon, and West Indian (mainly Haiti): from the French personal name Bertrand, a variant of Bertram , coined by folk etymology under the influence of the present participle endings -and, -ant.
History: This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Beltran
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Manuel, Carlos, Jesus, Luis, Pedro, Jorge, Mario, Ricardo, Francisco, Rafael.
Spanish (Beltrán), Catalan, and southern French: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements berht ‘bright, famous’ + hramn ‘raven’. See also Bertram .

variants.name: Beltramo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo.
Italian: from the medieval personal name Beltramo, of ancient Germanic origin (see Bertram ).

variants.name: Bert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Philibert, Pierre.
German, French, and Polish: from a short form of various compound personal names formed with ancient Germanic berht ‘bright, famous’ (see for example Bertram ).
English: from the Middle English female personal name Berte (Old French Berte, from ancient Germanic Berta ).

variants.name: Battermann
meanings: German:
possibly an occupational name for a merchant or peddler, from Bartermann.
alternatively, perhaps from a short form of the personal name Bertram + Middle High German man ‘man’.

variants.name: Bertran
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Jorge, Eduardo, Enrique, Joaquin, Ricardo, Aleida, Ana, Ana Maria, Elena, Felipe, Jeronimo.  French Andre.
French, Occitan, and Catalan: variant of   Bertram   or   Bertrand  .

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Bertram was born in 1128, in Mitford, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Bertram 2nd Baron of Mitford, the fair, was 49 and his mother, Hawise Balliol, was 26. He had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Ada de Morville. He died on 29 September 1177, in Brinkburn, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 49, and was buried in Brinkburn, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Bertram est né en 1128, à Mitford, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Bertram 2nd Baron of Mitford, the fair, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Hawise Balliol, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Ada de Morville. Il est décédé le 29 septembre 1177, à Brinkburn, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Brinkburn, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger Bertram 1128 in Mitford, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Bertram 2nd Baron of Mitford, the fair 49 und seine Mutter Hawise Balliol 26. Er hatte mit Ada de Morville mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 29. September 1177 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Brinkburn, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Brinkburn, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Bertram è nato il nel 1128 nel Mitford, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Bertram 2nd Baron of Mitford, the fair, aveva 49 anni e il suo madre, Hawise Balliol, aveva 26 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Ada de Morville. Morì il 29 settembre 1177, nel Brinkburn, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Brinkburn, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger Bertramが1128年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドミトフォードで生まれた時，父William Bertram 2nd Baron of Mitford, the fairは49歳，母Hawise Balliolは26歳であった。彼はAda de Morvilleとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1177年9月29日にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドブリンクブルンで49歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドブリンクブルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Bertram(이)가 1128년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 미트퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Bertram 2nd Baron of Mitford, the fair(은)는 49세였고, 그의 어머니 Hawise Balliol(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Ada de Morville(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1177년 9월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 브링k번에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 브링k번에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Bertram nasceu em 1128, em Mitford, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Bertram 2nd Baron of Mitford, the fair, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Hawise Balliol, tinha 26 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Ada de Morville. Ele faleceu em 29 de setembro de 1177, em Brinkburn, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Brinkburn, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Bertram родился в 1128 г. в местности митфорд, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Bertram 2nd Baron of Mitford, the fair было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Hawise Balliol, 26. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Ada de Morville. Он умер 29 сентября 1177 г. в местности бринкбурн, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности бринкбурн, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger Bertram nació en 1128, en Mitford, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Bertram 2nd Baron of Mitford, the fair, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Hawise Balliol, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Ada de Morville. Murió el 29 de septiembre de 1177, en Brinkburn, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Brinkburn, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
